what: Implement SelectActiveProject command with path revalidation and deterministic fallback logic when selected/current project is archived or invalid.

where.description: Add selection handler with validator call and fallback algorithm.
Add matrix tests for valid selection, invalid path, archived project, and no fallback candidate.
Ensure active query respects fallback result contract.

acceptance.given: A selectable project with valid current path
acceptance.then: That project becomes active and lastUsedAt is updated in persisted state.

acceptance.given: A selected project whose path validator returns invalid and no alternative valid project exists
acceptance.then: Activation is rejected and the result indicates onboarding-required state explicitly.

patterns.name: Hexagonal Revalidation
patterns.reference: ARCHITECTURE.md -> section 2 validators hidden behind port

context: Project activation governs entire app context and must never resolve to an invalid or archived project.
technicalNotes: Use deterministic fallback ordering documented in tests; avoid implicit random ordering. Merge-safe: isolated command/query + tests only. Models: Codex gpt-5.3-codex (high), Claude Opus 4.6 (high).
